expected_runtime.notes: Siglent per-average overhead is estimated from a fixed track-per-average housekeeping term, an empirically calibrated per-scan-point programming/GUI term, and a weaker average-waveform-length term.
Tracking runs once per average, so drift planning should use per_average_seconds / tracking_window_seconds rather than total_seconds. Changing averages does not shorten the untracked window.

interpretation: Running/nonterminal; monitor is active and status updated recently. No terminal pODMR verdict yet; no bridge queue mutation performed.
